title: Any templates for trade show participation?
excerpt: I handle my company’s participation in trade shows. I would love to see see if anyone has any high level boards that I can use to show my executive team (and anyone else) at a glance where we’ll be, how large our booth i…

posts.author: rosalyn.g (Rosalyn G)
posts.cookedHtml: I handle my company’s participation in trade shows. I would love to see see if anyone has any high level boards that I can use to show my executive team (and anyone else) at a glance where we’ll be, how large our booth is, budget, booth #, etc. I’d also love to see a low-level board for just my team to use as a checklist of sorts for all of the tasks involved with the planning process.

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Maybe something like this could be helpful?:

trade shows1587×918 92.1 KB

The map widget uses a location column to produce a map view so you can see where your shows will be. In this demo, the purple markers are past events and the blue markers are upcoming events.
Your execs can click on the markers to pull up an item view where they can get all of the pertinent information for that trade show:
Anaheim1574×866 138 KB

Here is what the table view looks like and how I would organize my tasks by trade show:
table view1583×876 83.6 KB

Let me know if you’d like help getting something like this set up!

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rosalyn.g

What @greg_elevate said is exactly right - we’ve used that solution before, and it worked perfectly

One of the best parts of the trade show boards that @greg_elevate screenshotted is that you can see where geographically each trade show is located, and you can get detailed information on each show directly from the map view. I highly recommend this type of board for trade shows!

posts.author: RM_Matthew (Matthew Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just wondering if there is something that meets the second part of this request - “a low-level board for just my team to use as a checklist of sorts for all of the tasks involved with the planning process.”
Thanks

posts.author: EkimEriksonEncoder (Mike Erikson)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed - I’m a little baffled that “trade show” isn’t a template. This seems like a PERFECT use case for a template. Maybe even have a few since trade shows can go from table top pop-ups to world class full built multi-story exposition booths. the other one would be the CMMC for Govt Contractors since those controls are standardized… Both things are being missed out on!
